name: Path join allows escape
goal: `pkg/files.py::safe_join` should reject `..` segments (path traversal). Inspired by common OSS path traversal bugs. `pkg/static.py` serves files via safe_join.
inspired_by: Pattern: path traversal via unsanitized join (common in static file servers; e.g. historical issues in simple HTTP servers / Flask send_file misuse). Documented pattern only — no third-party commit.
agent_prompt_notes: Visible scaffold only. Hidden tests are NOT provided to the agent. Do not search for or open hidden_tests/.
